title: Australian Russet Potato Stir Fry
description: A hearty and flavorful stir fry dish made with australian russet potatoes, sweet and chewy ingredients. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the cubed potatoes and cook until they start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced bell peppers and cook until they start to soften, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chewy bacon bits (if using) and cook until they're crispy.
Season with soy sauce and stir to combine.
Continue cooking for another 2-3 minutes, until the potatoes are tender.
